name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
administered_by: MUDRA, under Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance
retrieval_text: PMMY provides collateral-free loans to non-corporate, non-farm micro and small enterprises in manufacturing, trading and services. Four categories: Shishu up to Rs 50,000; Kishore Rs 50,001 to Rs 5 lakh; Tarun Rs 5 lakh to Rs 10 lakh; Tarun Plus Rs 10 lakh to Rs 20 lakh (introduced 24 October 2024, only for borrowers who have repaid a prior Tarun loan). Loans are available through banks, RRBs, SFBs, NBFCs and MFIs. No collateral required; covered under the Credit Guarantee Fund for Micro Units (CGFMU). Interest rate is set by the lending institution.
